scope.summary: Add zca-rust as a pinned git dependency and a zalo/ layer that wraps Zalo::new().login(), compiling cleanly into the Tauri core.
goals: zca-rust + tokio added to src-tauri/Cargo.toml (rustls TLS, no native bindings)
zalo/ layer wraps Zalo::new(None).login(credentials) and re-exports the API facade + Credentials + ZaloError
cargo build + clippy -D warnings clean, with an offline test proving the wrapper rejects empty credentials
nonGoals: Any real network login or live Zalo call

acceptance.description: zca-rust + tokio are wired into src-tauri/Cargo.toml and the crate compiles.
zalo/ wraps Zalo::new().login(); offline test proves empty credentials are rejected without a network call.
cargo clippy across all targets is clean under -D warnings.
